arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains reasons behind Darwin Nunez criticism after ‘unacceptable’ behaviour
arts.sum: The Liverpool boss was not impressed with Nunez’s work-rate against Wolves and Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains qualities that will make Robin van Persie a top manager after ‘smart’ Feyenoord appointment
arts.sum: The ex-Arsenal and Manchester United striker has been installed as head coach of Slot’s former club

arts.ttl: Jean-Philippe Mateta matches Mo Salah on ‘perfect night’ for Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Jean-Philippe Mateta has now scored as many goals as Mo Salah in 2025 after firing Crystal Palace to victory over Aston Villa on Tuesday night. The French striker scored either side of an Ismaila Sarr brace in a 4-1 win at Selhurst Park for the Eagles. Substitute Eddie Nketiah rounded out the victory with a […] The post Jean-Philippe Mateta matches Mo Salah on ‘perfect night’ for Crystal Palace first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool draw PSG, Arsenal face PSV, Villa meet Club Brugge in last 16
arts.sum: Liverpool will face Paris St-Germain in the Champions League last-16, while Arsenal take on PSV Eindhoven and Aston Villa will play Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Report: Wonderkid’s family travel to England as his move to Newcastle now imminent
arts.sum: Malaga’s rising star Antonio Cordero – better known as Antonito, – looks increasingly likely to join Newcastle United this summer and become their first transfer of the window. According to Diario Sur, the 18-year-old winger is edging closer to a move to St James’ Park after an impressive season in Spain’s second division. With four […] The post Report: Wonderkid’s family travel to England as his move to Newcastle now imminent appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher doubles down on Mohamed Salah claim after Rio Ferdinand 'clown' jibe
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has responded to criticism over comments about the Africa Cup of Nations and how playing for Egypt disadvantages Mohamed Salah's Ballon d'Or chances

arts.ttl: The last four Newcastle United teams to beat Liverpool away after 30 years of Anfield hurt
arts.sum: Newcastle United head to Anfield bidding once again to end their awful record against Liverpool in front of the Kop. It was another South American striker who would help United to this most unlikely of wins, 38 long years after the last Anfield success.

arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Liverpool and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Van Dijk v Isak: League's best defender faces this season's top striker
arts.sum: Meanwhile, in one of the matches where he failed to score, Isak drew a foul from Van Dijk that saw the latter handed a straight red card. Isak will not be fazed by the challenge as he has scored three goals in five appearances against Liverpool in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'I will return': £25m player Liverpool sold suggests he wants to come back to Anfield in three years
